Meet the Founders

Meet the Founders

OUR FOCUS

A unique approach to problem-solving

We combine unconventional solutions with solid, fact-based and pragmatic advice. Our team of intrepid go-getters is committed to providing clear, realistic and pragmatic guidance that empowers our clients to navigate the complexities of their legal situations with confidence.

Download Brochure

OUR FOCUS

A personable customer relationship culture

We prioritize building strong and trusting relationships with our clients. As we approach each case with diligence, openness and a sense of responsibility, we strive to create an environment where clients feel supported and cared for throughout the entire process.

Download Brochure

Our Focus

With us, it’s possible

You can anticipate outcomes with confidence, knowing that you have a team of accomplished professionals working tirelessly to secure the best possible resolution.

Download Brochure

We provide robust advice in a straight-forward, factual, realistic and pragmatic fashion.

We foster relationships and manage cases with attention and care.

We understand the regional landscape and offer local expertise with international standards.

We listen. We ask the right questions. Then we explore unchartered territories for inventive and proactive solutions.

What Drives Us

Client-Centricity

We put our clients’ needs first and foremost. We listen carefully, analyze deeply then undertake a diligent and bespoke approach to the task at hand.

Fairness

We respect the rule-of-law and the rule-of-life. We treat clients and colleagues like we wish to be treated and expect reciprocity in return.

Authenticity

We serve with transparency and honesty. We remain true to our values, principles and code-of-ethics. We always deliver what we promise. Our word is our oath.

Responsibility

We believe that each task is an opportunity for us to provide our clients with the added-value we believe they deserve. We consider our clients’ concerns as our own.

Mutuality

We believe in win-win and strive for mutually-beneficial outcomes. We employ our accumulated capital to reach the right results and expect recognition for this effort.

WHAT DEFINES US

Precursors

We are forerunners, always aiming to take the first step. We do not shy-away from exploring unchartered territories to reach the outcomes we seek.

Progressive

We embrace new ideas and are at the forefront of emerging trends. We believe law should be ever-progressing and we approach cases with innovation and creativity.

Driven

No matter the problem, we have an inner energy that keeps us on-the-go. With a can-do attitude, we take the lead and pursue our goals proactively, persistently and with the necessary resilience, to achieve the desired result.

Bold

We are not afraid to give our opinion clearly and assertively. We state the facts as they are and manage cases with pragmatism.

Responsive

We manage our clients’ relationships with proximity and attention and are quick to react with an action-minded stand on things. We always keep our clients informed.

BSA is established in Dubai, United Arab Emirates

Managing Partner, Jimmy Haoula, joins BSA

Abu Dhabi office opens

BSA is the first law firm to open in the Dubai International Financial Centre

Ras Al Khaimah office opens

Riyadh office opens

KEYFACTS

5

A truly regional firm, we have a physical presence in five countries across the Middle East

8

Throughout the region we have eight offices; UAE: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Ras al Khaimah, Sharjah, Muscat, Riyadh, Erbil and Beirut

20

Our legal departments are headed by twenty partners, spanning various practice areas, sectors and jurisdictions cementing BSA Law as a full-service firm

150

Our partners are assisted by a curated team of 150 talented lawyers

18

Across various legal directories BSA Law currently have eighteen department rankings, spanning multiple jurisdictions and practice areas

8

We are proud of our talented team, who have received eight legal directory rankings, solely through their hard work and client feedback

Testimonials

The depth of knowledge exhibited by BSA's attorneys in tackling multi-faceted issues has been truly remarkable. Their ability to analyze intricate legal details, coupled with their proactive approach to identifying potential obstacles, has proven invaluable.

Chambers & Partners Global Guide

Their expertise and strategic approach to intricate challenges consistently exceed our expectations. BSA has demonstrated an impressive capacity to navigate through convoluted legal scenarios with precision and innovation.

Chambers & Partners Global Guide

Very proactive and pragmatic in their advice and able to hold their own even amongst global firms. They are available and diligently pursue their client’s interest and they have strong regional roots which they celebrate.

Legal 500

Commercial issues remain at the heart of our discussions; conversations are very much geared towards ensuring our ability to execute our commercial strategy effectively under a construct that mitigates risk.

Chambers & Partners Global Guide

Extremely professional and organized and always offer the highest quality of service and always in a timely manner.

Legal 500
